items_all.title: The FCC says an auction of wireless mid-band spectrum raised $3.5B+, which will largely be used to fund the replacement of Chinese telecom equipment in the US (David Shepardson/Reuters)
items_all.title_original: The FCC says an auction of wireless mid-band spectrum raised $3.5B+, which will largely be used to fund the replacement of Chinese telecom equipment in the US (David Shepardson/Reuters)
items_all.title_en: The FCC says an auction of wireless mid-band spectrum raised $3.5B+, which will largely be used to fund the replacement of Chinese telecom equipment in the US (David Shepardson/Reuters)
items_all.title_zh: FCC 表示，無線中頻頻譜拍賣籌集了 3.5B+ 美元，這些資金將主要用於資助更換美國的中國電信設備（David Shepardson/路透社）
items_all.title_bilingual: FCC 表示，無線中頻頻譜拍賣籌集了 3.5B+ 美元，這些資金將主要用於資助更換美國的中國電信設備（David Shepardson/路透社） / The FCC says an auction of wireless mid-band spectrum raised $3.5B+, which will largely be used to fund the replacement of Chinese telecom equipment in the US (David Shepardson/Reuters)

items_all.title: Walmart acquires Vibe.co, which lets businesses create and buy ads on CTVs, sources say for $1.4B cash; top executives get $180M to stay for four years (Sarah Nassauer/Wall Street Journal)
items_all.title_original: Walmart acquires Vibe.co, which lets businesses create and buy ads on CTVs, sources say for $1.4B cash; top executives get $180M to stay for four years (Sarah Nassauer/Wall Street Journal)
items_all.title_en: Walmart acquires Vibe.co, which lets businesses create and buy ads on CTVs, sources say for $1.4B cash; top executives get $180M to stay for four years (Sarah Nassauer/Wall Street Journal)
items_all.title_zh: 消息人士稱，沃爾瑪以 14 億美元現金收購了 Vibe.co，該公司允許企業在 CTV 上創建和購買廣告；高管可獲 1.8 億美元留任四年（Sarah Nassauer/華爾街日報）
items_all.title_bilingual: 消息人士稱，沃爾瑪以 14 億美元現金收購了 Vibe.co，該公司允許企業在 CTV 上創建和購買廣告；高管可獲 1.8 億美元留任四年（Sarah Nassauer/華爾街日報） / Walmart acquires Vibe.co, which lets businesses create and buy ads on CTVs, sources say for $1.4B cash; top executives get $180M to stay for four years (Sarah Nassauer/Wall Street Journal)

items_all.title: Market intelligence company Klue confirms it has suffered a breach, for which cybercrime group Icarus takes credit; Jamf, HackerOne, and others are affected (Zack Whittaker/TechCrunch)

items_all.title_zh: 市場情報公司 Klue 確認其遭受了資料洩露，網路犯罪組織 Icarus 將此歸咎於該事件； Jamf、HackerOne 和其他公司都受到影響（Zack Whittaker/TechCrunch）
items_all.title_bilingual: 市場情報公司 Klue 確認其遭受了資料洩露，網路犯罪組織 Icarus 將此歸咎於該事件； Jamf、HackerOne 和其他公司都受到影響（Zack Whittaker/TechCrunch） / Market intelligence company Klue confirms it has suffered a breach, for which cybercrime group Icarus takes credit; Jamf, HackerOne, and others are affected (Zack Whittaker/TechCrunch)

items_all.title_zh: 沃爾瑪收購了總部位於巴黎的 Vibe.co，該公司允許企業在串流媒體服務上創建和投放有針對性的廣告； Vibe.co 的聯合創始人將加入 Walmart Connect（Brian Steinberg/Variety）

items_all.title: The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_original: The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_en: The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Shein 和 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/Bloomberg）
items_all.title_bilingual: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Shein 和 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/Bloomberg） / The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)

items_all.title: The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)

items_all.title_en: The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的非歐盟商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/彭博社）
items_all.title_bilingual: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的非歐盟商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/彭博社） / The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
